title: selaginella euclimax
intro: Selaginella euclimax, also known as Spiny Club Moss, is a type of evergreen, terrestrial plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Selaginella euclimax is typically prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
